zh.lifeSummary: 當Baldwin Lovel於1075年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特可盧頓時，他的父親Ralph Lovel26歲，母親Mrs. Lovell25歲。他於大約1100年與Mrs. Baldwin Lovel在英國英格蘭薩默塞特韋斯特 哈普崔結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.Clutton, Somerset, England: 英国英格兰薩默塞特可盧頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Baldwin Lovel于1075年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特可盧頓时，他的父亲Ralph Lovel26岁，母亲Mrs. Lovell25岁。他于大约1100年与Mrs. Baldwin Lovel在英国英格兰薩默塞特韋斯特 哈普崔结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Lovel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Lovell
meanings: English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lovel ‘wolf cub’, a diminutive of lou, love ‘wolf’. Compare Love and Low .

nameMeanings.name: Baldwin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from bald ‘bold, brave’ + wine ‘friend’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. In the Middle Ages it was a comparatively common name, which gave rise to a surname. It was borne by the Norman crusader Baldwin of Boulogne, who in 1100 was elected first king of Jerusalem, and by four further crusader kings of Jerusalem. It continued to be used by some families in England into the 17th century, but in modern times it normally represents a transferred use of the surname rather than a direct revival of the Norman given name.

en.lifeSummary: When Baldwin Lovel was born in 1075, in Clutton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, his father, Ralph Lovel, was 26 and his mother, Mrs. Lovell, was 25. He married Mrs. Baldwin Lovel about 1100, in West Harptree, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Baldwin Lovel est né en 1075, à Clutton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralph Lovel, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Lovell, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Mrs. Baldwin Lovel environ 1100, à West Harptree, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé dans sa ville natale.

Er hat um 1100 in West Harptree, Somerset, England, United Kingdom Mrs. Baldwin Lovel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb in seinem Geburtsort.

Lui sposato Mrs. Baldwin Lovel circa 1100, nel West Harptree, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ja.West Harptree, Clutton, Somerset, Englan: イギリスイギリスソメルセトウエスト ハープトレ
ja.Clutton, Somerset, England: イギリスイギリスソメルセトクルットオン
ja.lifeSummary: Baldwin Lovelが1075年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトクルットオンで生まれた時，父Ralph Lovelは26歳，母Mrs. Lovellは25歳であった。約1100年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトウエスト ハープトレでMrs. Baldwin Lovelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Baldwin Lovel(이)가 1075년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 클루턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph Lovel(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Lovell(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1100년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 웨스트 하르프트리에서 Mrs. Baldwin Lovel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Baldwin Lovel родился в 1075 г. в местности клуттон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Ralph Lovel было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Lovell, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. Baldwin Lovel около 1100 г. в местности вест харптри, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в его родном городе.
